title: Ubiquiti POE-48-24W-WH
category: Ubiquiti / Powering / Pasive PoE / PoE injectors
description: The Ubiquiti POE-48-24W-WH is a grounded PoE injector with a maximum output power of 24 W. It provides one input port for a traditional LAN connection and a second port as a PoE output port. The maximum data transfer rate is 100 Mbps Maximum output power: 24 W 1 PoE port Maximum Transmission Speed: 100 Mbps LED indication GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
